_comment: Sidebar manifest for the docs site. When the Astro/Starlight site is set up (currently absent from this fork — see CLAUDE.md note about website/), the build script reads this manifest to construct the sidebar. Until then, this file documents the intended placement of docs pages for future wiring.

explanation.label: Explanation
explanation.description: Concept docs — why a feature exists, design rationale, references

migration.label: Migration
migration.description: How-to docs — upgrade paths between schema versions

pages.title: Migrating from story-spec v2 to v3 (Bifurcation Mode)

_wiring_instructions.for_astro_starlight: When website/astro.config.mjs is added (upstream sync or new setup), import this JSON and convert each `sidebars.<group>.pages[]` entry to a Starlight `SidebarItem`. The `path` is relative to the repo root.
_wiring_instructions.for_other_static_site_generators: The structure { sidebars: { <group>: { label, description, pages: [{ slug, title, path }] } } } is generic — adapt the loader to your generator (Docusaurus, MkDocs, VitePress, etc.).
_wiring_instructions.current_status: This fork (florian-trehaut/bmad-global) does NOT yet have an Astro Starlight site. The docs/ pages are standalone Markdown — readable directly on GitHub, in IDEs, or via any MD viewer. Wiring will happen when the docs site is imported from upstream (bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD).
